title: Vanillafied Advancement Plaque
description: Advancement plaques for vanilla loving players
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Q3wHxpJ9fUI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
An addon to Advancement Plaques that makes it more fitting for vanilla gameplay and prevents you immersion from being rekted.


Installation Instructions:
Extract everything in the zip file onto the .minecraft directory
Accept to replace all files when asked to.

![ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f78b04f98231e8384f47cbafa0d7d80f41fafc_0.webp)
[**get a server here**](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3087)
